node.detail_zh: 患者 8 月 27 日乘搭 TK083 由希臘經伊斯坦堡抵港，入住北角華美達盛景酒店，沒有病徵，帶有 L452R 變種病毒。他曾於 3 月 23 日及 4 月 13 日在港接種兩劑復必泰疫苗，7 月 13 日在港的血液樣本對抗體呈陽性。
node.detail_en: The patient stays at Ramada Hong Kong Grand View, Nortn Point upon arrival in Hong Kong from Greece via Istanbul by flight TK083 on August 27, having exhibited no symptoms, whose specimen contains the L452R mutation. He received two doses of BioNTech vaccine in Hong Kong on March 23 and April 13, and his blood specimen tested positive for antibodies on July 13 in Hong Kong.

node.detail_zh: 患者 8 月 27 日乘搭 TK083 由土耳其抵港，沒有病徵。
node.detail_en: The patient arrived in Hong Kong from Turkey by flight TK083 on August 27, having exhibited no symptoms.

node.detail_zh: 患者與第 #12110 宗個案患者均為 #12104 及 #12105 宗個案患者的密切接觸者， 8 月 27 日乘搭 TK083 由土耳其抵港，沒有病徵，在檢疫中心確診。
node.detail_en: The patient, along with patient #12110, is a close contact of patients #12104 and #12105, and arrived in Hong Kong from Turkey by flight TK083 on August 27, having exhibited no symptoms. He was diagnosed positive at quarantine centre.

node.detail_zh: 患者與第 #12111 宗個案患者均為 #12104 及 #12105 宗個案患者的密切接觸者， 8 月 27 日乘搭 TK083 由土耳其抵港，沒有病徵，在檢疫中心確診。他曾於 6 月 27 日及 7 月 22 日在英國接種兩劑復必泰疫苗。
node.detail_en: The patient, along with patient #12111, is a close contact of patients #12104 and #12105, and arrived in Hong Kong from Turkey by flight TK083 on August 27, having exhibited no symptoms. He was diagnosed positive at quarantine centre, and he received two doses of BioNTech vaccine in the UK on June 27 and July 22.

node.detail_zh: 患者 8 月 26 日乘搭 QR818 由埃及經多哈抵港，入住尖沙咀華美達華麗酒店，8 月 15 日出現症狀，帶有 L452R 變種病毒。他曾於 3 月 18 日及 4 月 15 日在港接種兩劑科興疫苗。
node.detail_en: The patient stays at Ramada Hotel Kowloon, Tsim Sha Tsui upon arrival in Hong Kong from Egypt via Doha by flight QR818 on August 26. He developed symptoms on August 15 and his specimen contains the L452R mutation. He received two doses of Sinovac vaccine in Hong Kong on March 18 and April 15.
